source_notes_json: ["This is an in vivo DPK tape-stripping study; not a traditional Franz-cell IVPT. No receptor medium or diffusion cell is used — drug amount in SC is the endpoint. Diffusion area estimated from template diameter 2.5 cm (π×1.25²≈4.91 cm²). The endpoint_main value (12.2 µg/cm²) is from Figure 3 (immediately post 30-min application); Table II values cover the subsequent clearance phase (post-removal, unoccluded unless noted). Both occluded and unoccluded post-removal conditions are reported in Table II."]
